title.es: Telemetría de la compañía – Captura en el frontend

description.en: Implement frontend telemetry capture in the company backoffice: FastAPI stub POST /telemetry/events, TelemetryService with local queue, batch debounce (10s / 20 events), sendBeacon flush, retry with backoff, single track() API, and inventory plus auth instrumentation aligned with Phase 1 event-schemas.json — env-driven endpoint, no PII.
description.es: Implementa la captura de telemetría en el backoffice de la empresa: stub FastAPI POST /telemetry/events, TelemetryService con cola local, batch debounce (10s / 20 eventos), flush con sendBeacon, retry con backoff, API única track() e instrumentación de inventario y auth alineada con event-schemas.json de la Fase 1 — endpoint por variable de entorno, sin PII.

sharing.en: I just completed Company's Telemetry – Frontend capture with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/ai-eng-telemetry-capture #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #telemetry #fastapi
